contents.value:
```graphql
type User {
  id: ID!
  name: String!
  email: String
  posts: [Post!]!
  role: Role!
}
```
**type** defines an object with fields. `!` means non-null, `[Type]` means list.

```graphql
field @deprecated(reason: "Use newField")
field @skip(if: $condition)
field @include(if: $condition)

directive @auth(requires: Role = ADMIN) on FIELD_DEFINITION
```
**Directives** add metadata. Built-in: `@deprecated`, `@skip`, `@include`. Custom directives extend functionality.

```graphql
# Built-in:
ID       # unique identifier
String   # UTF-8 text
Int      # 32-bit signed integer
Float    # double-precision float
Boolean  # true/false

scalar DateTime
scalar JSON
```
**Scalars** are leaf types. Custom scalars need resolver implementation.

```graphql
schema {
  query: Query
  mutation: Mutation
  subscription: Subscription
}
```
**schema** defines the root operation types. Optional if using the default names `Query`, `Mutation`, `Subscription`.

```graphql
type Query {
  users(
    limit: Int = 10
    offset: Int = 0
    filter: UserFilter
    sortBy: SortField = NAME
  ): [User!]!
}
```
**Arguments** can have default values and be of any input type. Every field can have arguments.

```graphql
type User {
  id: ID!
  username: String @deprecated(reason: "Use 'name' instead")
  name: String!
}
```
**@deprecated** marks a field or enum value as deprecated. Reason is shown in introspection and tooling.

```graphql
type User {
  id: ID!           # non-null scalar
  posts: [Post!]!   # non-null list of non-null posts
  tags: [String]     # nullable list of nullable strings
}
```
**Non-null** `!` means the field never returns null. `[Type!]!` = non-null list with non-null items.

```graphql
type User {
  profilePicture(size: Int = 100, format: ImageFormat = JPG): String!
  friends(first: Int!, after: String): FriendConnection!
}
```
**Field arguments** allow callers to customize field resolution. Support default values.

```graphql
directive @auth(requires: Role = ADMIN) on FIELD_DEFINITION
directive @cacheControl(maxAge: Int) on FIELD_DEFINITION
directive @deprecated(reason: String) on FIELD_DEFINITION | ENUM_VALUE
```
**Custom directives** extend schema behavior. Locations: `FIELD_DEFINITION`, `OBJECT`, `ARGUMENT_DEFINITION`, etc.

```graphql
type Query {
  user(id: ID!): User          # may return null if not found
  users: [User!]!              # never null, items never null
  search(term: String): [Result] # nullable list, nullable items
}
```
**Nullability** — without `!`, fields can return null. Design nullability based on error handling strategy.

```graphql
type User {
  name: String!
  bio: String
}
```
**String** is a UTF-8 character sequence. One of the five built-in scalar types.

```graphql
"""A registered user of the platform."""
type User {
  "The unique identifier."
  id: ID!
  "The user's display name."
  name: String!
}
```
**Descriptions** are doc strings using `"""block"""` or `"inline"` quotes. Shown in introspection and tooling.
